data.title: 国际服2025愚人节礼物十连券
data.summary: [Pandemonium Society Live Apology Statement] Sensei, today's official live hosted by the Pandemonium
data.body:
[Pandemonium Society Live Apology Statement]

Sensei, today's official live hosted by the Pandemonium Society was unfortunately cut short due to unexpected technical issues.

It was a purely technical mishap, completely unrelated to Makoto! Still, for those who may have been inconvenienced during the stream, seems like they prepared a small gift & special soundtrack!

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2775199
➡️ Soundtrack: https://youtu.be/FzJjz4EwmIw

#BlueArchive
![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/wiF6Bo4or7Qm9Xre2gSGJ33XzwTAscOx.png)
